Tomato_Bacterial_spot.cause: Bacterial infection caused by Xanthomonas species. Spreads through water splash and infected seeds.
Tomato_Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use certified seeds, avoid overhead irrigation, apply copper-based sprays.

Tomato_Early_blight.cause: Fungal infection caused by Alternaria solani, common in warm humid conditions.
Tomato_Early_blight.prevention: Crop rotation, remove infected leaves, apply fungicide regularly.

Tomato_Late_blight.cause: Caused by Phytophthora infestans, spreads rapidly in cool wet weather.
Tomato_Late_blight.prevention: Ensure good air circulation, avoid excess moisture, use resistant varieties.

Tomato_healthy.prevention: Maintain proper irrigation, nutrients, and regular monitoring.
